display_title: Slay the Spire 2:The Sunken Statue
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Sunken Statue.png}} {{E|The Sunken Statue|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}} and the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Grab the Sword}} {{TS|positive||Obtain {{R|Sword of Stone||2}} (relic).}}
{{Frame|Dive into the Water}} {{TS|positive||Gain 101-121 Gold.}} {{TS|negative||Lose 7 HP.}} == Dialogue ==
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a {{TS|blue||stone sword}}. Something is also {{TS|gold|up|glittering}} at the bottom of the pond. Votive offerings perhaps? You could really use some money...
{{Frame|Grab the Sword}}
You {{TS||up|wrest}} the {{TS|blue||sword}} out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart! It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was {{TS|gold|up|glittering}} at the bottom of the pond now... Inspecting the {{TS|blue||sword}}, you sense an incredible {{TS|green||dormant power}} within.
{{Frame|Dive into the Water}}
You plunge deep into the water! While collecting the offerings you hear a dull echo and you're struck by stones! Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; physical and spiritual.
